lines: Welcome to Hearthveil, the heart of our world, {player}!
I am Ignavarr, and I have seen many explorers, but none quite like you.
There are seven realms to explore, each with its own wonders and lessons.
Your dragon companion is waiting for you. Are you ready for adventure?
Remember, {player}, even the smallest step is part of a great journey.
Wisdom is found in the questions we ask, not just the answers we find.
The portals are humming with energy. Which realm calls to you today?
Hearthveil will always be here to welcome you home, {player}.
no_quest_line: You're doing wonderfully, {player}! Keep exploring and learning.
quest_offer_line: I have an important task that only a brave explorer like you can handle, {player}.
quest_progress_line: You're making great progress! Hearthveil is proud of you, {player}.
quest_complete_line: Magnificent work, {player}! You've truly earned your place among our legends.
